name: FY2025 Year-End Appeal
description: Annual year-end appeal targeting all active donors with FY impact report and matching gift opportunity.
ai_narrative: The FY2025 Year-End Appeal was a strong performer, exceeding expected revenue by 13% with a 9.76x ROI. Leadership and Major tier donors responded at unusually high rates, likely driven by the matching gift incentive. Mid-Level and Friend tier conversion rates were below historical averages — suggest testing a $500 matching tier for this segment next year.
recommendations: Test a $500 matching tier for Mid-Level and Friend segments in FY2026
Replicate the impact report format for mid-year stewardship mailings
Identify the 45 donors who opened but did not give — add to Q1 personal outreach queue

name: Spring 2026 Major Donor Cultivation
description: Intimate cultivation dinners and field visit offers for top 50 Major and Leadership tier prospects.
ai_narrative: The Spring 2026 Cultivation campaign is mid-cycle and tracking below expected revenue (48% of goal). The 7 closed gifts average $10.3K — below the Major tier average — suggesting the ask conversations may be occurring too early in the cultivation sequence. Three high-propensity prospects (Hartwell, Chen, Rodriguez) have not yet been engaged in a personal meeting.
recommendations: Accelerate personal outreach to Hartwell, Chen, and Rodriguez before May 15
Add a field visit component for the top 5 prospects by giving capacity
Review ask timing — move major gift conversations to meeting #2, not meeting #1
